actions.label: Wi-Fi
actions.command: sh -c 'nmcli radio wifi | grep -qw enabled && nmcli radio wifi off || nmcli radio wifi on'
actions.update-command: sh -c 'nmcli radio wifi | grep -qw enabled && echo true || echo false'

actions.label: Bluetooth
actions.command: sh -c "bluetoothctl show | grep -q 'Powered: yes' && bluetoothctl power off || bluetoothctl power on"
actions.update-command: sh -c "bluetoothctl show | grep -q 'Powered: yes' && echo true || echo false"

actions.label: Luz nocturna
actions.update-command: sh -c 'archfrican-nightlight status | grep -q on && echo true || echo false'
